---
number-sections: true
number-offset: [7, 0]
---

# Empirical Example: Neural Networks for Time Series Prediction

[Jupyter notebook comparison of FNN, RNN, and LSTM for neural network prediction](https://github.com/onnokleen/teachingML/blob/main/neural_networks.ipynb)

The overall outcome may be summarized as follows: If we don't apply any pre-aggregation to the lagged input series, the FNN is beaten by RNN and LSTM. However, the differences are marginal.
